mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id as postId, c.author, c.content, c.created_at as createdAt, COALESCE(u.nickname, c.author) as nickname FROM community_comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.author = u.username WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comments (post_id, author, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{author}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id as postId, c.author, c.content, c.created_at as createdAt, COALESCE(u.nickname, c.author) as nickname FROM community_comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.author = u.username WHERE c.id = #{id}
